name: dodojo-core
description: DoDojo core — zero-token `dj` CLI for plugin stack audit + prune, session telemetry, greeter, heartbeat alerts, maintenance skills (memory curator, surgical-edit, recall), and memory-graph: a maintained relation graph over your memory with semantic links, a dedup gate, and a multi-agent (PM/QA/Eng/Arbiter) collaboration layer. Companion plugins: dodojo-guards (safety blockers), dodojo-sensei (ROI advisor).
